content.text: [Sat 2026-03-07 08:39 GMT+1] Hello, what can you help me with?

[[reply_to_current]]

🟡 **Welcome to Binance Support AI!**

I'm here to help you with all things **Binance**. Here's what I can assist you with:

---

**🔐 Account & Security**
• KYC / Identity Verification
• Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
• Login issues & account recovery
• Account security settings

**💹 Trading**
• Spot, Futures & Margin trading
• Order types & trading fees
• Binance Earn, Staking & Launchpad

**💸 Deposits & Withdrawals**
• Network selection & transfer limits
• Deposit/withdrawal issues & fees
• Fiat on/off ramps

**💳 Binance Products**
• Binance Pay & Binance Card
• P2P Trading
• Binance Web3 Wallet

**📱 Platform Help**
• App & web platform navigation
• General crypto concepts (Binance-related)
• Compliance & restricted regions

---

Just ask your question and I'll do my best to help! For account-specific issues, I may direct you to official Binance support. 😊
